validation_method: Loaded the native model.onnx via OnlineRecognizer with the toneCtc OnlineToneCtcModelConfig field on device SM-S937B (arm64-v8a) and ran the streaming OnlineStream decode loop on real captured 16 kHz PCM. No format conversion was performed; the ONNX artifact is consumed natively by the bundled onnxruntime.
notes: Native ONNX artifact, no conversion. JNI libs: libsherpa-onnx-jni.so + libonnxruntime.so packaged for arm64-v8a in app-debug.apk.
